name: Raspberry Creme Brulee
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 8 raspberries in the center of each of six ramekins.
2. Heat heavy cream to a simmer.
3. In a bowl, whisk egg yolks, sugar, and salt until smooth.
4. Gradually whisk in hot cream, then stir in vanilla extract.
5. Divide the mixture evenly among the ramekins.
6. Place ramekins in a baking pan and add boiling water to cover halfway.
7. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 35-40 minutes until set; do not overbake.
8. Remove from pan, cool completely, then chill thoroughly.
9. Sprinkle 2 teaspoons sugar on top of each custard before serving.
10. Use a hot salamander to melt and caramelize the sugar on each dish.
11. Garnish with additional raspberries.
Note: You can also use the broiler to melt and caramelize the sugar quickly, but be careful as it turns fast.
